refusal.epistemic:
Generation refused.
Reason:
Input lacks sufficient intellectual tension, operational detail, or falsifiable observations to produce a high-density editorial thread.
refusal.thesis:
Generation refused.
Reason:
Thesis confidence too low — system detected invented cognition rather than derived insight from input material.
refusal.retry:
Generation failed.
Reason:
System could not derive a sufficiently novel thesis from provided context.
refusal.quality_exhausted:
Generation failed.
Reason:
Draft did not pass quality gates before publish.

detail.quality_failed: Quality gates failed — draft not published

evaluator.specificity: Specificity score {score} below {minimum} (need numbers, named systems, or operational nouns)
evaluator.relation_drift_comparison: Relation drift tweet {tweet}: '{value}' ({metric}) attributed near '{comparison}' but subject '{subject}' missing
evaluator.relation_drift_subject: Relation drift tweet {tweet}: '{value}' used without anchor subject '{subject}'
